summary: Analytics Verification (P0) - All 34 backend tests passed. Revenue calculations, pipeline stages, portal views, sequences stats, digest preview, and milestones CRUD all working correctly.
feature_tested: Analytics Verification P0 - Financial and engagement analytics accuracy

revenue_stats.PAID_IN_FULL_RECEIVED_counting: PASS - Revenue correctly counts PAID_IN_FULL and RECEIVED statuses
revenue_stats.DEPOSIT_RECEIVED_OVERDUE_pending: PASS - Expected/pending correctly counts EXPECTED, DEPOSIT_RECEIVED, OVERDUE

revenue_pipeline.GET /api/analytics/revenue-pipeline: PASS - All 5 stages present with correct data
revenue_pipeline.inProgress_stage: PASS - count=1, value=2000 (Pipeline Client A - deposit paid + BOOKED status)
revenue_pipeline.paidInFull_stage: PASS - count=1, value=3000 (Revenue Test Client - finalPaid=true or status=PAID_IN_FULL)

portal_views.GET /api/portal/:token: PASS - Returns 200 with project, client, status, meta
portal_views.portalViews_increment: PASS - Views correctly increment on each visit
portal_views.lastPortalView_update: PASS - lastUpdated timestamp present in meta

sequences_dashboard.GET /api/sequences/dashboard: PASS - Returns 2 sequences with correct stats
sequences_dashboard.enrolled_completed_active_counts: PASS - client-onboarding: enrolled=1, completed=0, active=1; quote-followup: enrolled=2, completed=1, active=1
sequences_dashboard.active_excludes_stopped: PASS - Active count correctly excludes stopped enrollments

sequences_stats.emailsSentThisWeek_counting: PASS - Counts individual emails (email1SentAt, email2SentAt, email3SentAt) not enrollments

digest_preview.GET /api/digest/preview: PASS - Returns digest with stats and period
digest_preview.totalRevenue_calculation: PASS - Revenue from PAID_IN_FULL and RECEIVED income, value=1500

analytics_dashboard.pipelineValue: PASS - Calculated from leads in pipeline statuses

monthly_trend.year_boundary_handling: PASS - Dec 2025 (2025-12) and Jan 2026 (2026-01) correctly separated
monthly_trend.data_structure: PASS - Each month has month, monthKey, count, revenue

milestones_crud.PATCH /api/leads/milestones/:id: PASS - Updates milestone (note: different route structure)
milestones_crud.portal_timeline: PASS - Milestones visible on portal via /api/portal/:token/timeline

auth_required.all_endpoints: PASS - All 5 analytics endpoints return 401 without auth

critical_code_review_comments: crm.ts getRevenueStats correctly includes PAID_IN_FULL in receivedStatuses and DEPOSIT_RECEIVED/OVERDUE in pendingStatuses
analytics.ts revenue-pipeline correctly checks both income.status and boolean flags (depositPaid/finalPaid) for pipeline stages
sequences.ts dashboard stats correctly counts individual emails (email1SentAt, email2SentAt, email3SentAt) instead of enrollments
sequences.ts dashboard active count correctly excludes stopped enrollments
digestService.ts queries RECEIVED and PAID_IN_FULL for totalRevenue calculation
portal.ts correctly increments portalViews and updates lastPortalView on each visit
analytics/monthly-trend correctly handles year boundaries with YYYY-MM monthKey format
Milestone routes use different structure: GET/POST use /api/leads/:id/milestones while PATCH/DELETE use /api/leads/milestones/:milestoneId
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics Verification P0 complete. All revenue calculations, pipeline stages, sequence stats, digest preview, and milestones working correctly. Key findings: (1) Revenue uses PAID_IN_FULL + RECEIVED for received, EXPECTED + DEPOSIT_RECEIVED + OVERDUE for pending, (2) Pipeline stages check both income.status and boolean flags, (3) Sequence stats count individual email timestamps not enrollments, (4) Milestone CRUD routes differ - GET/POST use /api/leads/:id/milestones while PATCH/DELETE use /api/leads/milestones/:milestoneId
